issues.sample: Faulty n83 and Electric Drive Failure occured after charging @ public charging center. No longer under warranty  but currently owe 5k on Mercedes lease .  Mercedes dealership recommended replacement of both @ 16k  I leased the car from them used . Time when lease began 19k

narrative.headline: What 2019 Smart Fortwo owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (100% of reports).
